basics.name: Shane Holmes
basics.label: Computer Engineer
basics.summary: Computer Engineer with experience in embedded systems, robotics, and software development. Passionate about building things from first principles — from low-level embedded firmware to machine learning models and 3D rendering engines.

work.name: Overhead Intelligence
highlights: C++/C, Python, Raspberry Pi, STM32, ESP32, Odroid, LiDAR, Git

work.name: Advanced Mobility Institute
highlights: C++/C, Python, Raspberry Pi, OpenCV, Electronics

awards.title: IEEE HKN Member
awards.summary: Member of the IEEE HKN honor society chapter.

projects.name: Mock Rover — FSI Capstone Project
projects.summary: Reverse-engineered and rebuilt a non-functional mock rover inherited from previous student teams with zero documentation. Led technical integration of embedded control systems for the NASA Space Grant Consortium program through Florida Space Institute.
highlights: Raspberry Pi-based architecture coordinating four AC motors, stereoscopic camera feed, and wireless command interface
~100ft wireless range, 300lb payload capacity, 5mph traverse speed
Python, C++, Raspberry Pi, Arduino Uno, motor control systems, stereoscopic cameras, 3D printing

projects.name: Hand Robot — Commissioned Project
projects.summary: Designed and fabricated a fully articulated robotic hand with individual finger control and accompanying arm. Owned the entire development pipeline from mechanical design through embedded systems to software control interface.
highlights: Iteratively designed hand and arm in CAD with custom 3D printed components
Engineered servo control circuits on Arduino platform
Developed desktop application in C++ for real-time articulation control
Arduino, C++, CAD, 3D printing, servo control systems

projects.name: 3D CPU Software Rasterizer
projects.summary: Built a 3D software rendering engine from first principles in C++. No GPU acceleration or rendering libraries — every stage of the pipeline from 3D transformations through triangle rasterization is implemented manually.
highlights: Full graphics pipeline: model space → world space → camera space → screen space
Scene graph with hierarchical parent-child entity system
Triangle rasterization using edge functions and barycentric coordinates
Multithreaded display via SFML, OBJ file loading, CMake build system
